closed_reason: Typed sync gates now enforce retry backoff for automatic paths while explicit sync and shutdown use a force-start path with regression coverage and reviewed semantics.
description: Direct maybe_start_sync paths can bypass scheduled backoff/cooldown semantics. Require a scheduler-issued sync gate token so retries cannot start outside allowed backoff window.

notes.author: darin@book
notes.content: Audit: workspace /Users/darin/src/personal/beads-rs; jj commit a63acc28. Implemented scheduler-issued sync gate epochs, backoff-dominant pending semantics, stale-gate invalidation, and an explicit force-start path for shutdown/manual sync that clears bypassed retry state. Verification: cargo fmt --all --check; cargo test -p beads-daemon --features test-harness; cargo clippy -p beads-daemon --all-features -- -D warnings. Review: two subagent review rounds, both green after fixing reported issues.

title: P0: Enforce sync backoff via typed sync gate token

acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] Known strict deps `missing field cc` failure path shows actionable migration hint.
- [ ] Hint text references `bd migrate to 1` explicitly.
- [ ] Unrelated parse/IO errors are not remapped to migration hint.
- [ ] Test coverage confirms hint appears only for intended failure class.
description:
**Problem**
When strict runtime load fails on legacy deps (`missing field cc`), users currently get a low-context parse error with no clear remediation path.

**Files**: crates/beads-rs/src/cli/backend.rs, crates/beads-git/src/sync.rs, crates/beads-cli/src/commands/* (as needed)
design:
**Design**
Add targeted error surfacing for the known strict deps failure signature:
- detect parse failures equivalent to legacy deps missing `cc`
- attach actionable hint to run `bd migrate to 1`

Keep error mapping narrow so unrelated parse failures do not receive misleading migration guidance.

notes.author: darin@book
notes.content: Audit on 2026-03-11 against /Users/darin/src/personal/beads-rs-legacy-deps-v1-cutover @ f0de8dc3: strict runtime load now maps only the known legacy deps missing-cc decode signature to a ValidationFailed store error with explicit `Run `bd migrate to 1`` guidance; unrelated parse/IO failures are not remapped. Coverage includes both hint and non-hint integration paths, and the workspace gates are green (`cargo test`, `just dylint`, `cargo clippy --all-features -- -D warnings`).

title: Migration slice 5: Actionable runtime hint for legacy deps parse failure

closed_reason: Completed: created /Users/darin/.codex/skills/gh-run-post-pr-loop and validated it with quick_validate.py.
description: Author a Codex skill that runs after a PR is pushed: wait, inspect CI with gh-fix-ci, inspect review comments with gh-address-comments, implement valid fixes, adversarially review with subagents, push, request @codex review, wait again, and repeat.
title: Create post-PR follow-up skill for CI/comments/review loop
